app.name: Futtei-Kokatsu
settings.title: Settings
settings.theme.title: Theme
settings.language.title: Display language
settings.tray.title: Tray icon
settings.tray.desc: Choose the icon shown in the tray (menu bar).
settings.trend.title: Show usage trend
settings.trend.desc: Show the consumption heatmap by day of week and hour.
settings.heat.title: Usage trend colors
settings.heat.desc: Color palette for the day-of-week × hour heatmap. Grayscale inverts its shading to match the theme.
settings.dateformat.title: Date format
settings.dateformat.desc: How reset times and other dates are formatted. International (Feb 11, 10:40pm) or Japanese (2/11 22:40).
settings.autostart.title: Launch at login
settings.autostart.desc: Automatically start this app when you log in to Windows and keep it in the tray.
settings.hideonblur.title: Hide when focus is lost
settings.hideonblur.desc: When this window loses focus, tuck it into the tray instead of leaving it open. Measurement keeps running; click the tray icon to bring it back.
meter.session.label: Session (5-hour window)
meter.week.label: Weekly (all models)
meter.caretHint: Vertical line: where you'd be at a steady pace. Past it means overuse.
chart.zoomHint: Wheel: zoom horizontally / Ctrl+Wheel: zoom vertically / Drag: pan / Double-click: reset
heat.title: Usage trend (day × hour)
heat.empty: Trends appear once data accumulates across days
